# Breakpoints

Breakpoints define the viewport widths at which the layout adapts. All components in the design system are built responsively against these values — they are the foundation for fluid, device-agnostic layouts across Yale sites.

## Breakpoint Scale

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={BreakpointsStories.breakpoints} />
</div>

## How Breakpoints Are Used

Breakpoints are consumed as SCSS variables and mixins throughout the component library. You won't set breakpoints directly in Drupal — they're baked into each component's responsive behavior. Understanding the scale helps when reviewing designs or diagnosing layout issues at specific viewport sizes.

For more on layout and spacing, see the [Spacing page](?path=/docs/tokens-spacing--docs).
